title: QVC Shareholders Claim Firm Giving Their Value to Creditors
description: Shareholders of bankrupt television shopping network QVC accused the company of wrongly trying to divert hundreds of millions of dollars’ worth of assets to creditors as part of a proposal to cut debt and end the company’s insolvency case.

title: Trump Media Posts $405 Million Loss Driven by Crypto Holdings
description: The Trump family media group posted a net drop of $405.9 million in the first quarter, largely driven by unrealized losses in cryptocurrencies held by the company.

title: ECB’s Escrivá Says AI Risks Prompt Finance Infrastructure Review
description: Central banks must review the resilience of financial infrastructure given the rise of artificial intelligence, as well as defend their role as the ultimate guarantor against risks posed by stablecoins, said European Central Bank Governing Council member José Luis Escrivá.
